chosen_action.title: Respect active measurement-hold windows before rerunning heavy marketing work

why_this_action.summary: The loop could choose measurement_hold and then wake up again minutes later, redoing expensive work inside the same short review window. A real cooldown makes the hold enforceable.

expected_outcome.primary_goal: stop repeated cron churn during active measurement-hold windows
expected_outcome.measurement_window: effective immediately on the next marketing loop run
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If a new live external marketing action lands after the hold, the cooldown automatically clears and the loop can run normally again.
